records.ety: [AS. tēn, tin, tn, tēne; akin to OFries. tian, OS. tehan, D. tien, G. zehn, OHG. zehan, Icel. tīu, Sw. tio, Dan. ti, Goth. tahun, Lith. deszimt, Russ. desiate, W. deg, Ir. & Gael. deich, L. decem, Gr. de`ka, Skr. daçan. √308. Cf. Dean, Decade, Decimal, December, Eighteen, Eighty, Teens, Tithe.]

defs: One more than nine; twice five.
quotes: With twice ten sail I crossed the Phrygian Sea.
There 's a proud modesty in merit, Averse from begging, and resolved to pay Ten times the gift it asks.
notes: ☞ Ten is often used, indefinitely, for several, many, and other like words.

defs: The number greater by one than nine; the sum of five and five; ten units of objects.
quotes: I will not destroy it for ten's sake.

defs: A symbol representing ten units, as 10, x, or X.
